summary: Testing 5 bugs/features for POS Caisse Pro. FOUND & FIXED BUG in backend: server-daily-report and server-end-of-service endpoints were filtering by non-existent 'date' field instead of 'created_at'. All requested features verified: Mon Point (server daily report), Accomp. Gratuit button, Manager Tables tab with table click details modal, Revision badge for expenses.

fixed_by_tester.issue: Was filtering by 'date' field which doesn't exist in invoice schema. Fixed to use 'created_at' with regex
fixed_by_tester.fix_applied: Changed query from {"date": target_date} to {"created_at": {"$regex": f"^{target_date}"}}

fixed_by_tester.issue: Same issue - was filtering by 'date' field. Fixed to use 'created_at'
fixed_by_tester.fix_applied: Changed query to use created_at regex filter

console_warnings.issue: Hydration error: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>
console_warnings.note: React hydration warning in Tables tab table rendering - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: /api/server-daily-report/{name} - Returns correct structure with server stats filtered by created_by
✅ Backend: /api/server-daily-report accepts date parameter and filters correctly
✅ Backend: /api/server-end-of-service - Creates report with calculated stats from invoices using created_by
✅ Backend: /api/expenses - Create, list, update status to revision_requested working
✅ Backend: Caisse login works for Server (PIN 1234) and Manager (PIN 0000)
✅ Frontend: Server (Marie Dupont) sees 'Mon Point' tab with daily report content
✅ Frontend: Server can create new table and add products
✅ Frontend: 'Accomp. Gratuit' button appears when bill has items
✅ Frontend: Free accompaniment modal shows 14 options (Riz, Frites, Pâtes, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Adding free accompaniment adds item with (GRATUIT) label and 0 F price
✅ Frontend: Manager (Mères AHOUANDJINOU) can access Tables tab
✅ Frontend: Tables tab shows Suivi des Tables with statistics (occupied, free, duration, quality)
✅ Frontend: Tables grid shows occupied tables with color-coded borders and eye icon
✅ Frontend: Clicking occupied table opens details modal
✅ Frontend: 'Détails des Tables Occupées' table shows server, client, articles, total, duration
✅ Frontend: Achats tab shows revision badge and 'À RÉVISER' section with expenses
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: server-daily-report was using 'date' field which doesn't exist in invoices collection - changed to use created_at regex filter
The Invoice model only has 'created_at' timestamp, not a separate 'date' field - server endpoints were filtering incorrectly
TablesTab has minor React hydration warnings but works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices with created_by='TEST_Server_For_Point' and 'TEST_Server_Stats'. Created expense with status='revision_requested'. Created table T5 with Salade niçoise and Riz blanc (GRATUIT).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features/bugs are working correctly. Bug in server-daily-report endpoint was found and fixed (used 'date' instead of 'created_at' for filtering). The free accompaniment feature adds items with (GRATUIT) suffix and 0 F price. Manager Tables tab shows real-time table status with click-to-view details. Revision badge shows count of expenses with revision_requested status.

mon_point_server.notes: Server sees Mon Point tab with daily report. Backend now correctly uses created_by filter with created_at date regex.

accomp_gratuit_button.notes: Button appears when bill has items. Modal shows 14 accompaniment options. Selected item added with (GRATUIT) suffix and 0 F price.

manager_tables_tab.notes: Manager can see Tables tab with Suivi des Tables. Shows statistics (occupied/free/duration/quality). Tables grid with color-coded borders.

table_click_details.notes: Clicking on occupied table opens modal with order details. Shows server, client, items, duration, total.

revision_badge.notes: Manager sees orange badge when expenses have revision_requested status. Achats tab shows 'À RÉVISER' section.

bug_rca.issue: Server Mon Point showing 0 invoices despite server having created invoices
bug_rca.root_cause: Backend endpoints /api/server-daily-report and /api/server-end-of-service were filtering by a 'date' field that doesn't exist in the Invoice model. Invoices only have 'created_at' timestamp.
bug_rca.fix_applied: Changed MongoDB query from {"date": target_date} to {"created_at": {"$regex": f"^{target_date}"}}
bug_rca.verification: After fix, server-daily-report returns correct invoice count and stats for the server
